item.title: Ex vivo gene therapy for cystinosis had acceptable safety and improved disease biomarkers
item.description: 1. In this phase 1–2 open-label study, autologous lentiviral hematopoietic stem-cell gene therapy for cystinosis was associated with sustained engraft...

item.title: Replacing sedentary time with physical activity may lower risk of all-cause mortality
item.description: 1. In this prospective cohort, individuals with greater periods of sedentary time have increased risks of all-cause mortality and mortality from cance...

item.title: Metformin and ursodeoxycholic acid do not improve long COVID recovery
item.description: 1. In this randomized controlled trial, neither metformin nor ursodeoxycholic acid improved recovery from long COVID compared with placebo in adults. ...

item.title: Breast cancer screening with MRI provides modest benefit for high-risk women
item.description: 1. For women at higher-than-average risk, adding supplemental MRI to DBT provided only modest additional benefit, resulting in a similar harm-benefit ...
